vulnerabilities.description: JWT RSA key decoding from base64 without validation. decodeRSAKey() parses base64 directly without proper key validation. Lines with base64 decoding and big.Int parsing lack error bounds checking.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add strict key size validation (2048+ bits), verify N and e are within bounds, add key fingerprint validation, use x509.ParsePKCS1PublicKey instead of manual big.Int parsing

vulnerabilities.description: Missing JWT algorithm validation. No explicit verification of JWT signing algorithm (rs256 vs none). Vulnerable to algorithm confusion attacks where 'none' algorithm could bypass signature verification.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add explicit verification: if token.Method != jwt.SigningMethodRS256 { return nil, errors.New('invalid signing method') }

vulnerabilities.description: Global mutable rateLimitStore variable has race condition. The in-memory fallback rate limiter uses sync.RWMutex but stores entries map as global mutable state. Concurrent access could cause data races.
vulnerabilities.fix: Move rateLimitStore inside RedisRateLimiter struct with proper encapsulation, or remove in-memory fallback entirely as commented 'not recommended for production'

vulnerabilities.description: Potential path traversal in LoadPolicyFromFile. User-controlled filename could access arbitrary files if filepath.Join doesn't sanitize properly. No validation that policyPath is within expected directory.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add filepath validation: ensure resolved path is within policy directory, use filepath.EvalSymlinks, validate no '../' components, use whitelist of allowed policy names

vulnerabilities.description: ToUser() method may expose internal fields. Direct field assignment without validation could lead to inconsistent state (Enabled vs Active fields).
vulnerabilities.fix: Add validation in ToUser(), ensure Enabled and Active are synchronized, add setter methods with validation

vulnerabilities.description: Magic link OTP generation using crypto/rand with hex encoding is good, but no explicit entropy validation or OTP expiration check visible in snippet.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add explicit entropy check: if len(otp_bytes) < 16 { return error }, verify OTP expiration at generation time

vulnerabilities.description: ApprovalPolicy AutoApproveConditions uses map[string]interface{} which could allow arbitrary policy injection. No type validation for conditions.
vulnerabilities.fix: Define strict AutoApproveCondition struct with validated types, implement schema validation for policy conditions

vulnerabilities.description: No visible request ID validation in audit handlers. Timeline and statistics endpoints may be vulnerable to injection if IDs aren't validated.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add UUID validation for all ID parameters, validate query parameters for search

owasp_checks.detail: IDOR protection partial - user_id from context in MFA handlers is good, but certification.go doesn't show access control on campaign operations
JWT RSA key decoding now has proper validation (2048+ bit minimum, exponent bounds, modulus checks), explicit RS256 algorithm verification added
SQL injection prevented (pgx uses prepared statements), domain validation good, policy loading path traversal fixed with EvalSymlinks and comprehensive validation
In-memory rate limiter fallback is unsafe for production, race condition in global state remains
Test credentials visible in test files (acceptable), but no visible security headers configuration
MFA handlers properly get user_id from authenticated context, UUID validation prevents session injection
Audit chain has integrity verification endpoint, JWT signature validation with explicit RS256 check

critical_fixes.issue: Add explicit JWT algorithm verification to prevent 'none' algorithm attacks
Validate RSA key bounds in parseRSAPublicKey function
critical_fixes.details: Added 2048-bit minimum key size, exponent bounds (3 to 2^31-1), modulus validation (odd, positive, probable prime), high bit set check

critical_fixes.issue: Add path traversal protection to LoadPolicyFromFile
critical_fixes.details: Added filepath.EvalSymlinks, path traversal component checks ('..', '\'), resolved path validation

critical_fixes.issue: Remove global rateLimitStore or properly encapsulate it
